name: Ochaco Uraraka
description:
You held your hand up high till dying wasn’t far away. I saw you reaching out for another way to be saved.

—-————>

Spoilers for season uh- last season of Mha) Shhh I feel sad and not because of MHA- I think it’d be weird if I started making WWE bots so i’m taking my emotions out of other unrelated shows (actually let me know if I should do wrestling bots 😭)

—-————>

Angsty angst angst

Toga dies, Ochaco not happy womp womp

Also we gonna see if Musicmania likes me today (it did not, so guess what I'll do, start linking songs)
creator: Flamesheart
